data.title: implementation-plan defaults to deferring wireframes for UI stories instead of designing them inline
data.description: When /dso:implementation-plan encounters UI stories that need wireframes, it presents a choice to the user with 'Defer wireframes' as the default (first) selection. This biases toward skipping wireframe design, which leads to UI stories being implemented without proper design artifacts. For stories involving UI elements, designing wireframes should be the default recommendation, not deferral. The prompt should either default to 'Design wireframes now' or remove the deferral option when UI elements are clearly in scope. Observed in a host project preplanning session where 3 UI stories (context bar, project management UI, post-login routing) were all defaulted to deferred wireframes.
